title: dirachmaceae
intro: Dirachmaceae is a family of flowering plants, specifically a group of plants that are classified together based on their shared characteristics and evolutionary relationships. It is a rank used in botanical taxonomy to categorize plants with distinct physical and reproductive features. Dirachmaceae plants are typically woody, deciduous, and often found in temperate climates. This family includes several genera of plants, such as Dirachma, that are native to Africa and the Middle East.
